{{Quote|This is Yellow Five. Yellow Team Leader is ''down''!|"Yellow Five"|<ref name="R70" />}}
'''Yellow Team''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit that fought at the [[Battle of Rendili]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the forces of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and [[Rendili Home Defense Fleet]]. In that engagement, the [[Yellow Team Leader|team's leader]] was shot down, a fact reported by subordinate "[[Yellow Five/Legends|Yellow Five]]."<ref name="R70" />

{{Military-stub}}
